name: busycal
title: BusyCal
description: Create BusyCal events and tasks, search your schedule, and find the next free slot.
author: beehive

preferences.name: hideOnQuickAdd
preferences.title: Quick Add
preferences.label: Hide Raycast after quick add
preferences.description: Hide the Raycast window after a Quick Add command succeeds.

preferences.name: defaultUpcomingDays
preferences.title: Upcoming Horizon
preferences.description: How many days the Upcoming command should look ahead by default.

preferences.name: includeTasksInUpcoming
preferences.title: Upcoming Results
preferences.label: Include Tasks in Upcoming
preferences.description: Include tasks alongside events in the Upcoming command.

preferences.name: defaultMinimumAvailabilityMinutes
preferences.title: Availability Duration
preferences.description: The default minimum slot length used by Find Next Available Time.

preferences.name: defaultRespectWorkingHours
preferences.title: Availability Scope
preferences.label: Respect Working Hours by Default
preferences.description: Use BusyCal's working-hours window by default when finding availability.

commands.name: quick-add-event
commands.title: Quick Add Event
commands.subtitle: BusyCal
commands.description: Create a BusyCal event from natural language

commands.name: quick-add-task
commands.title: Quick Add Task
commands.subtitle: BusyCal
commands.description: Create a BusyCal task from natural language

commands.name: upcoming-items
commands.title: Upcoming Items
commands.subtitle: BusyCal
commands.description: Browse upcoming BusyCal events and tasks

commands.name: find-next-available
commands.title: Find Next Available Time
commands.subtitle: BusyCal
commands.description: Find the next free time slot from BusyCal

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

Use npm run publish for Raycast Store publishing, not npm publish.

" && exit 1
